title: TypeScript bounded queue limit
description: Add a fixed capacity limit to a small queue helper.

prompt.userRequest: Cap the queue at 50 items by dropping the oldest item when a new item is pushed past the limit.
prompt.publicContext: Keep the public push and values methods unchanged.

referenceSolutionNotes: The reference solution defines MAX_ITEMS = 50 and shifts the oldest item after push when the array exceeds the cap.
negativeControlWrongSolution: A wrong solution rejects new values after 50 items, which violates the requested drop-oldest behavior.
